ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT

DEFENDANT MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED.PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RETURN ANY MONIES COLLECTED BY WAY OF THE JUDGMENT IF THE SAID JUDGMENT IS SET BY THIS ORDER.PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ATTY'S FEES AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $ 3,000 IS HEREBY GRANTED.DEFENDANT' SREQUEST THAT PLAINTIFF REMOVE ALL LIENS PLACED ON DEFENDANT'S PROPERTY IS HEREBY GRANTED.
